---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Open Claude Code in a new directory
2. Run `/book-genesis`
3. Provide idea: "..."
4. Observe error at step...

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages.

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g., macOS 14.2, Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04)
- **Claude Code version:** (run `claude --version`)
- **Subscription:** (Pro / Max)
- **Skill:** (which skill was active when the bug occurred)

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or relevant project state.
